'''Havath Prime''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Muunilinst system/Legends|Muunilinst system]],<ref name="GATORW" /> a part of the [[Obtrexta sector/Legends|Obtrexta sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by thirty-two [[Moon/Legends|moons]], itself circling the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Muunilinst]].<ref name="GATORW" /> The entirety of the Muunilinst [[Star system/Legends|system]] was located along the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Havath Prime was first mentioned in the [[2004]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''.<ref name="GATORW" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Muunilinst system, and therefore Havath Prime, in grid square K-4.<ref name="TEA" />
